title: Chef Aid Non Stick Milk Pan, 14 Cm High Grade Aluminium Pan with Pouring Lip and Stay Cool Handle, for Use On Gas, Electric and Ceramic Hobs (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack

HIGH GRADE - This Milk pan is made from lightweight aluminium, which makes it durable and long-lasting. It also has a High Grade Xylan non-stick coating that prevents food from sticking and ensures easy cleaning
COMFORTABLE HANDLE - The Milk pan comes with a comfortable Bakelite handle that stays cool even when the pan is heated. This ensures a secure grip and makes it easy to manoeuvre the pan while cooking
POURING LIP - The pan has a pouring lip that can be used to decant into a bowl or boat to then be placed on the table or poured directly onto the meal or hot drink

VERSATILE - The Chef Aid Non-stick Aluminium Milk Pan is perfect for a variety of cooking tasks, such as cooking vegetables, warming milk, melting butter, boiling eggs, simmering sauces or soups, or simply reheating leftovers.. Its compact size makes it easy to store and perfect for those with limited kitchen space
EASY CLEAN - The non-stick coating ensures that food does not stick to the pan and makes it easy to clean. Additionally, the saucepan is dishwasher safe, making cleaning up a breeze
